content:
```diff
+ # Medieval Pixel Art Color Palette
+
+ A unified color palette with 8 thematic ramps, each containing 5 shades from darkest shadow to highlight.
+
+ ## Stone (Grays)
+ - Shadow: #2F2F2F
+ - Dark: #585858
+ - Mid: #8A8A8A
+ - Light: #BDBDBD
+ - Highlight: #E6E6E6
+
+ ## Wood (Browns)
+ - Shadow: #3B2F2F
+ - Dark: #6B4F3F
+ - Mid: #9C7B5B
+ - Light: #CDAF8A
+ - Highlight: #F0DDBA
+
+ ## Gold (Yellows)
+ - Shadow: #5A4B1C
+ - Dark: #A07F1A
+ - Mid: #D4B93B
+ - Light: #F1D86B
+ - Highlight: #FFF9B1
+
+ ## Crimson (Reds)
+ - Shadow: #4A1E1E
+ - Dark: #7B2B2B
+ - Mid: #B03B3B
+ - Light: #D97B7B
+ - Highlight: #F2BABA
+
+ ## Royal Blue (Blues)
+ - Shadow: #1E2F4A
+ - Dark: #2B4B7B
+ - Mid: #3B6BB0
+ - Light: #7B9BD9
+ - Highlight: #BAD4F2
+
+ ## Forest Green (Greens)
+ - Shadow: #1E4A2F
+ - Dark: #2B7B4B
+ - Mid: #3BB06B
+ - Light: #7BD99B
+ - Highlight: #BAF2BA
+
+ ## Iron (Dark Grays)
+ - Shadow: #1C1C1C
+ - Dark: #3A3A3A
+ - Mid: #5A5A5A
+ - Light: #8A8A8A
+ - Highlight: #BDBDBD
+
+ ## Parchment (Warm Whites)
+ - Shadow: #8B7E6B
+ - Dark: #B2A68F
+ - Mid: #D9D1B8
+ - Light: #F2EDD9
+ - Highlight: #FFFDF1
```
